name: subscribe_youtube_premium
goal_template: Subscribe to YouTube Premium on the {plan_type} plan (individual / family / student) using the signed-in Google account

steps.intent: Navigate to YouTube and confirm the correct Google account is signed in

steps.target_desc: user avatar in the top-right corner

steps.intent: Navigate to the YouTube Premium landing page
Initiate the subscription or free trial
steps.target_desc: Try it free / Get Premium button on the chosen plan

steps.intent: Verify the correct payment method on the Google Pay billing page
steps.target_desc: payment method selector or 'Add payment method' link

success_checks: Redirected back to YouTube with a 'Welcome to Premium' confirmation banner
Ad-free playback confirmed on any video
YouTube Music Premium accessible in the Google account
